commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ef0182d075216b31a4210a929a067604ed142fd2)
commands.review_summary:
The PR moves outbound and session delivery queue persistence from JSON sidecar files to shared SQLite state, with doctor migration and backup scrubbing changes.

PR surface: Source +556, Tests +80, Other +1. Total +637 across 22 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: run the legacy queue migration once with a failed JSON entry plus a malformed sibling so the directory remains, then run it again after the row already exists. The second run rebuilds `failed_at` with a new `Date.now()` and compares that column as a conflict.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human/contributor handling because real behavior proof is missing, the branch has merge conflicts, and the compatibility-sensitive migration still has a code defect.

target.title: refactor: move delivery queues to SQLite
target.body:
## Summary

- Move outbound and session delivery queues from JSON sidecar files into the shared OpenClaw SQLite state table.
- Add doctor migration for legacy queue JSON, removing fully migrated queue dirs and leaving only malformed/conflicting sources in place.
- Scrub transient delivery queue rows from SQLite backup snapshots and preserve failed queue rows from stale acks.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Delivery queue state now persists in SQLite instead of random JSON queue files, with doctor migration for old queue files and backup scrubbing for transient pending rows.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on macOS, Node/pnpm repo wrappers.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm test src/infra/state-migrations.test.ts src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.storage.test.ts src/infra/backup-create.test.ts src/infra/session-delivery-queue.storage.test.ts src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.recovery.test.ts src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.reconnect-drain.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/action-runtime.test.ts`; `git diff --check`; `pnpm exec oxlint src/infra/delivery-queue-sqlite.ts src/infra/state-migrations.ts src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.storage.test.ts src/infra/backup-create.ts src/infra/backup-create.test.ts src/infra/state-migrations.test.ts src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue-storage.ts src/infra/session-delivery-queue-storage.ts src/infra/session-delivery-queue.storage.test.ts src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.recovery.test.ts src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.reconnect-drain.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/action-runtime.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo && node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo && node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`.
Evidence after fix: Focused tests passed 3 Vitest shards: unit-fast 12 tests, infra 75 tests, Telegram 78 tests. Targeted oxlint, diff whitespace, and all three tsgo lanes passed. Final autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: Runtime queue operations use `delivery_queue_entries`; legacy queue files import through doctor; fully migrated source dirs are removed; conflicting/malformed sources remain for manual cleanup; backup archives include a scrubbed SQLite snapshot without delivery queue rows.
What was not tested: Full `pnpm check:changed` did not finish green because core lint reported an unrelated pre-existing issue in `src/agents/openai-transport-stream.ts:3527`; touched-file lint and type/test proof passed after that.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require an open issue or PR
